name: check_sentiment
description: Check social sentiment and community momentum for any token. Returns sentiment score (0-100), momentum trend, community metrics (Reddit, Telegram, social links), developer activity (GitHub commits, stars, PRs), crowd voting sentiment, and market fear/greed context. Is there hype? Is the community active? Social sentiment check. Token sentiment. Community analysis. Social momentum. Is this token trending?
requirement: {"type":"object","required":["token"],"properties":{"token":{"type":"string","description":"Token contract address or symbol"},"chain":{"type":"string","description":"Chain: base (default), ethereum, bsc"}}}
